ogTitle: Kotara South vs Krawarree: Climate Safety

heading: Kotara South vs Krawarree — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kotara South, New South Wales and Krawarree, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kotara South has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Krawarree (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kotara South or Krawarree safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kotara South has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Krawarree scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kotara South scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Krawarree scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kotara South or Krawarree?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kotara South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
